name: Source Fidelity review for Ssr Quality Evaluation bundle
summary: Accepted after checking the staged source metadata, source locators, sample notes, model/version notes, and quality-evaluation statements against the cited EPFL Infoscience, arXiv, and ACL Anthology primary pages. The staged records use section-level locators for full-text sources, and the bundle intentionally defers exact numeric table extraction for Lu and Wang, Srivatsa et al., and Scarlatos et al. rather than overclaiming.

findings.claim_or_issue: Several sources expose full text and likely contain more precise numeric tables than this bootstrap bundle stages.
findings.why_it_matters: Source fidelity is acceptable for the baseline map, but later quantitative synthesis should not rely on abstract-level metric summaries.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the current medium-confidence, method-family synthesis and extract table-level values in a later manual pass before numeric comparison.
